_comment: Per-block size constraints (pixels) for the character-sheet dock panels. Keyed by block. Omit a bound (or set it to null/0) to leave it unconstrained: a missing minimum is 0, a missing maximum is unbounded. max_width pins a block so it can't be stretched horizontally; max_height pins it vertically. Setting min == max in a dimension fixes that dimension (non-resizable); abilities and resistances share one fixed 280x300 size that fits all of either block's content.
